nasb.text: You shall take with you of every clean animal by sevens, a male and his female; and of the animals that are not clean two, a male and his female;

esv.text: Take with you seven pairs of all clean animals, the male and his mate, and a pair of the animals that are not clean, the male and his mate,

cnv.text: 潔淨的牲畜，你要各帶七公七母；不潔淨的牲畜，你要各帶一公一母；

ccb.text: 洁净的动物，你要每样带七公七母，不洁净的动物每样带一公一母，

csbs.text: 你要从所有洁净的牲畜中各带七公七母，从不洁净的牲畜中各带一公一母，
